content:
# session_89 (iter-089) — DualInverse.lean v4.31.0 migration recovery

## Metadata
- **Sorry (DualInverse.lean): 6 → 0.** File sorry-free + axiom-clean (`#print axioms` on
  `dual_restrict_iso`, `sliceDualTransport`, `sliceDualTransportInv`, `homLocalSection`,
  `homOfLocalCompat` → `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]` only; NO `sorryAx`).
- `lake build AlgebraicJacobian.Picard.TensorObjSubstrate.DualInverse` = **EXIT 0** (8563 jobs),
  zero `DualInverse.lean … declaration uses sorry` warnings.
- SOLO `prove` lane, 1 `.lean` file edited (+ MEMORY.md). 22 edits, 0 successful interim builds
  (3 failed → 1 final green), 2 goal checks. Build discipline honored: only scoped
  `lake build …DualInverse` (never the monster / bare `lake build`).
- Active-cone regression inventory after this iter: TensorObjSubstrate **6**, **DualInverse 0**,
  TensorObjInverse **19**, PresheafDualUnitPullback **1** (FLANK, pre-existing — not a regression).

## Context
iter-089 plan diagnosed a **v4.31.0 toolchain-bump regression** (Jun-27, branch `mathlib-bump-v4.31`):
~36 fragile defeq/whnf-heavy proofs were `sorry`-isolated to reach green. The "3-sorry FLANK"
narrative through iter-088 is OBSOLETE. This iter recovered the lightest regressed file (DualInverse,
upstream of the 12.8M-HB monster, so no OOM) to establish the systematic fix pattern.

## Targets (all SOLVED — see milestones.jsonl for per-attempt code/errors)
1. `dual_restrict_iso` isoMk naturality (~L937) — `sorry` → **`subsingleton`** (thin Opens Y hom-space).
2. `sliceDualTransport` naturality (~L625) — `exact sliceDualTransport_naturality_apply …`; required
   **relocating** `sliceDualTransport_naturality_apply` (+`appIso_hom_naturality_apply`,
   `dualUnitRingSwap_apply`) above the def (the original sorry was a forward-reference ordering bug).
3. `sliceDualTransportInv` naturality (~L449) — `exact sliceDualTransportInv_naturality_apply …`;
   ported the helper from the orphan sibling `DualInverse/SliceTransport.lean`.
4. `sliceDualTransport` left_inv (~L765) — glue into `sliceDualTransportInv_app_apply` + `_apply`
   lemmas + φ-naturality. Build error: v4.31.0 stricter defeq rejected
   `(restrictScalars g).obj (𝟙_ _) ≡ Γ(Y,_)` at L409/L431 → fixed by the `respectTransparency false` knob.
5. `sliceDualTransport` right_inv (~L806) — mirror of left_inv; `hβc` re-derived inline with
   `simp only [...] at h ⊢; exact h` (NOT `simpa … using h`, which left a `forget₂`-map mismatch).
6. `homLocalSection` naturality (~L1085) — chart-chase; 3 failed attempts on the opener (`rw` pattern
   mismatch from `(Over.forget U).op.map φ` spelling + eqToHom-proof drift) → closed with
   `erw [reassoc_of% hML]; erw [Category.assoc, reassoc_of% hm, hNR]; simp only [Category.assoc]; rfl`.
   Transitively also closed `homOfLocalCompat` (simp-unfolds homLocalSection).

## The systematic v4.31.0 fix pattern (deliverable for the next-iter fan-out)
1. **α-naturality `by sorry`** in `{ app := fun U => (f.appIso U.unop).inv, naturality := by sorry }`
   (v4.31.0 `aesop_cat` no longer auto-closes) → `naturality := fun _ _ i => f.appIso_inv_naturality i`
   (4 sites).
2. **`simpa only [restrictScalars_η]` on unit-object carriers** — stricter defeq rejects
   `(restrictScalars g).obj (𝟙_ _) ≡ Γ(X,_)` → prepend
   `set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false in`.
3. **`(Over.forget U).map φ.unop |>.op` → `(Over.forget U).op.map φ` spelling drift** — realign each
   `Subsingleton.elim`/`map_comp`-proved `have` (spelling is free).
4. **eqToHom-proof drift breaks `rw`** (two eqToHoms defeq but not syntactic) → use `erw`.
5. **`rw [← Category.assoc, h]` opener fails** → `erw [reassoc_of% h]` reaches the same left-nested
   form up to defeq.
6. **`simp only [Category.assoc]` won't re-associate across a defeq category boundary**
   (`(M.restrict U).val.presheaf.map` vs `M.val.presheaf.map`) → use `erw [Category.assoc]`.

## KEY DISCOVERY — recovery source is the orphan `SliceTransport.lean`, NOT `main`
The objectives said "port from parent `main`". WRONG for the slice machinery: `main` (870 LOC)
predates the slice-dual-transport rework and lacks `sliceDualTransport`, `sliceDualTransportInv`, and
their `_apply` helpers. The v4.30 originals live in
`AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/TensorObjSubstrate/DualInverse/SliceTransport.lean` (74 KB, orphan, imported
nowhere). `main` is the source only for `dual_restrict_iso` (`subsingleton`) and `homLocalSection`
(`erw` chart-chase). **Next-iter fan-out lanes for TensorObjSubstrate/TensorObjInverse must likewise
check for sibling orphan files, not just `main`.**

## Review subagents (this phase)
- **lean-auditor** `iter089`: 0 critical / 4 major / 7 minor —
  `task_results/lean-auditor-iter089.md`. All 4 majors are **doc-only / dead-code, no live defect**:
  (1) stale module docstring L14–47 still claims `dual_restrict_iso`/`sliceDualTransport` open + 
  `dual_isLocallyTrivial` "TRANSITIVELY PARTIAL"; (2) dead `map_smul'` blocker comment L860–880
  (solution is right below at L900–913); (3) stale planner-strategy blocks L1172–1181, L1257–1259;
  (4) three **dead declarations** `εInv_apply`, `appIso_swap_cancel`, `presheafMap_ofBijective_symm`
  (L192–245, ported from orphan, called nowhere). Confirmed: all `subsingleton`/`Subsingleton.elim`
  uses are genuine thin-poset (Opens/Over) hom-spaces — NOT laundered; the four `respectTransparency
  false` flags are legitimate migration fixes (L395/L419 lack the explanatory comment present on L373).
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** `dualinverse-iter089`: PASS, 0 must-fix / 2 major / 4 minor —
  `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-dualinverse-iter089.md`. All 27 `\lean{}` statements match;
  no placeholder bodies; sorry-freeness confirmed by source scan (all 8 `sorry` tokens are in
  comments; the LSP axiom check broke-pipe). **Directive premise corrected:** of the 4 helpers the
  prover flagged uncovered, only `dualUnitRingSwapHom_apply` and `unitRelabelSwap_apply` are genuinely
  uncovered; `sliceDualTransportInv_naturality_apply` and `sliceDualTransportInv_app_apply` ARE
  blueprint-pinned. Extra uncovered: `εInv_apply` (live). 2 majors = the same stale docstrings
  the auditor flagged.

## Notes
- blueprint-doctor clean (0 structural findings).
- sync_leanok ran (iter 89, sha b3aa9ac): +12 / −95 markers — the −95 reflects the bumped files'
  lost markers across the regression; the +12 reflects DualInverse recovery + parts of the consolidated
  chapter rebuilding.
- No manual `\leanok` overrides made (build green, sync ran correctly).

## Recommendations → `recommendations.md`
